programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a truck filled with armor-piercing rifles is hijacked, the team works to discover who stole it, and what they have planned for the stolen weapons; a friend from OA's past returns to help with the case, but OA isn't sure he can trust him.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the police ignore a desperate father's plea for help, he abducts a billionaire's daughter and holds her hostage in a safe room until his own missing child is returned to him; Jubal puts his hostage negotiation skills to the test.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the team is called to the scene of a murder, it quickly suspects political motivation; Maggie contemplates a decision that could affect her entire career.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a man is killed by an explosive package shipped to his home, the team attempts to capture the sender and intercept his latest deadly parcel; Maggie struggles to trust her younger sister.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team rushes to track down two doctors abducted by a desperate father willing to do anything to save his son; Jubal's uncertainty in his family life affects his judgment during the hostage situation.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the CEO of a major brokerage firm is killed while surrounded by protesters, the team looks into who had the most to lose from his company's perceived manipulations; Scola's previous Wall Street career and the reasons he left come to light.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: While investigating a mass casualty incident at a New York City restaurant, the team scrambles to determine if it was racially motivated and if there was more than one gunman; Maggie starts to notice troubling behavior from her co-worker Elise.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When five prominent men are gunned down at a trendy New York restaurant, the team's investigation brings them into contact with a lieutenant in Antonio Vargas' cartel, triggering a showdown between Isobel and Vargas.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a young woman is killed on her way home from a lavish yacht party, the team investigates who she was and how she came to be at the event.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home. Along for the ride is Jia, an orphaned girl who has a unique and powerful bond with the mighty beast. However, they soon find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla as he cuts a swath of destruction across the globe. The initial confrontation between the two titans -- instigated by unseen forces -- is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the planet.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Bout Camp
programme.desc: WBO lightweight champion Abdullah Mason trains to defend his title, but unexpected news creates a new challenge, forcing him to adjust his fight preparation before stepping into the ring.

programme.title: Ringside
programme.desc: Boxing legends Terence Crawford, Tim Bradley Jr. and Shawn Porter will preview the night's matches. Hosted by Adam Lefkoe.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.sub-title: The Fight: Abdullah Mason vs. Albert Bell
programme.desc: Abdullah Mason (20-0, 17 KOs) and Albert Bell (28-0, 9 KOs) square off for the WBO lightweight world title. Also: Bruce Carrington vs. Rene Palacios, Tiger Johnson vs. Christopher Guerrero; Scooter Davis vs. Carlos Ramos.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: LeBron James and agent Rich Paul team up with Anthony Davis to prank NBA star Draymond Green with an ultra-exclusive investment opportunity, while Olympic gymnast Jordan Chiles traps WNBA star Rickea Jackson in a parking-lot nightmare.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: Anthony Davis lures former NFL defensive lineman Gerald McCoy into a movie audition where he damages superhero memorabilia.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Jess LaCroix and his team come to help OA find a fugitive LaCroix arrested years ago after a bus with 26 students goes missing, and he's the main suspect.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates a drug deal gone bad after the body of a college student is found; Detective Hailey Upton temporarily joins the team and finds her investigative methods clash with the Bureau's more buttoned-up environment.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team welcomes a new member, Special Agent Tiffany Wallace, as they search for killers who orchestrated a mass shooting at a media company; OA's personal connection with the case threatens to cloud his judgment.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team welcomes a new member, Special Agent Tiffany Wallace, as they search for killers who orchestrated a mass shooting at a media company; OA's personal connection with the case threatens to cloud his judgment.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team races to stop an active serial killer after three women are found weighted down at the bottom of a lake; Jubal looks into an old closed case after there are multiple similarities to the recent victims.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the leader of a drug cartel and one of the world's most wanted men is apprehended by the team, the entire FBI headquarters is put at risk when his henchmen unveil a plot to free him; Isobel must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie, OA and the team must stop a hacker who is disabling life-saving equipment in several New York City hospitals; Jubal's son waits for important surgery at one of the impacted hospitals.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team finds a connection between bombings and a private veterans' club in New York City; Isobel tells a reluctant OA to recruit a former Army buddy for intel.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team hunts for a serial killer who is targeting young, homeless men; Tiffany and Scola don't see eye to eye on how to handle the case.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a suburban woman is kidnapped from her home, the team looks into trysts on both sides of a seemingly perfect marriage; OA feels pressure from Mona to make changes in his career path.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: George Banks (Steve Martin) and his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), are the proud parents of Annie (Kimberly Williams), but when she returns from studying abroad and announces that she's engaged, their whole world turns upside down, especially that of overprotective George. From meeting the in-laws to wedding plans with an over-the-top consultant (Martin Short) and his flamboyant assistant (B.D. Wong), it seems as if the troubles never end in this update of the classic Spencer Tracy comedy.

programme.title: Father of the Bride Part II
programme.desc: Just when George Banks (Steve Martin) has gotten used to his daughter, Annie (Kimberly Williams), being married, she announces that she's pregnant, making him an impending grandfather. Shaken by nearing this new milestone in his life, George soon has to process even more surprising news -- his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), is pregnant too. Reeling from these revelations, George gets help from the eccentric Franck (Martin Short), who, conveniently, has moved from planning weddings to baby showers.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

programme.title: NASCAR Nation Pre-Race
programme.desc: From Chicagoland Speedway. Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jeff Burton, Jamie McMurray and Marty Smith set the stage for the eero 400.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series eero 400 takes place at Chicagoland Speedway in Joliet, Illinois. Shane van Gisbergen enters with momentum after winning the Save Mart 350. Tyler Reddick sits second in points and takes on the 400.5-mile asphalt track.

programme.title: NASCAR Nation Post Race
programme.desc: From Chicagoland Speedway. Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jeff Burton, Jamie McMurray and Marty Smith recap the eero 400.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: An ex-UFC fighter ends up working at a rowdy bar in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Ransom
programme.desc: Through a life of hard work, airline owner Tom Mullen (Mel Gibson) has amassed a great deal of wealth. When a group of criminals want a piece of his cash, they kidnap his son (Brawley Nolte) for a $2 million ransom. Encouraged by his wife (Rene Russo) and an FBI agent (Delroy Lindo), Tom prepares to pay the money, but the ransom drop goes awry. Enraged, Tom decides to turn the tables on the kidnappers by making the ransom a bounty on their heads -- which he announces on national television.

programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be medical students in training with standardized patient actors, then play the hero and break up a public fight, hoping to earn applause; one Joker has to put his hips where his mouth is and settle a bet of his own making.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A magical board game unleashes a world of adventure on siblings Peter and Judy Shepherd. While exploring an old mansion, the youngsters find a curious, jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-mannered monkeys and even stampeding rhinos!

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: The story of Marisa Ventura (Jennifer Lopez), a single mother born and bred in the boroughs of New York City, who works as a maid in a first-class Manhattan hotel. By a twist of fate and mistaken identity, Marisa meets Christopher Marshall (Ralph Fiennes), heir to a political dynasty, who believes that she is a guest at the hotel. Fate steps in and throws the pair together for a magical night of romance. When Marisa's true identity is revealed, the two find that they are worlds apart.

programme.desc: Spurred on by their wives' insistence that their children attend summer camp, daycare entrepreneurs Charlie Hinton (Cuba Gooding Jr.) and his friend Phil (Paul Rae) decide to buy their dilapidated alma mater, Camp Driftwood. The men face a near impossible task; not only must they renovate the place, but they face stiff competition from nearby Camp Canola, which is run by Charlie's arch-rival, Lance (Lochlyn Munro). Charlie asks his estranged father for help in restoring Driftwood's former glory.
